name: Quebec Precious Metals Corp.
description: Quebec Precious Metals Corporation is a Canadian-based gold exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mining projects. The company holds a significant land position in the highly prospective Eeyou Istchee James Bay territory of Quebec, strategically located near Newmont Corporation’s Éléonore gold mine. Its flagship asset is the Sakami project, which features well-defined, drill-ready targets with significant gold grades. In addition to gold, the company explores for other mineral resources, including base metals and lithium, to advance its portfolio within the region.
